Title: Create a new User
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- id: 1
- Password: password123
- Email: user@example.com
- Name: John
- Cognome: Doe
Test Steps:
1. Call newId() method to generate a unique id.
2. Set the password using setPassword("password123").
3. Set the email using setEmail("user@example.com").
4. Set the name using setName("John").
5. Set the cognome using setNome("Doe").
Expected Result: A new user object with the provided data should be created.

Title: Update User's Email
Preconditions: User already exists with an email.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing user object.
2. Call setEmail("new.email@example.com").
Expected Result: The user's email should be updated to "new.email@example.com".

Title: Update User's Name
Preconditions: User already exists with a name.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing user object.
2. Call setName("Jane").
Expected Result: The user's name should be updated to "Jane".

Title: Update User's Cognome
Preconditions: User already exists with a cognome.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing user object.
2. Call setNome("Smith").
Expected Result: The user's cognome should be updated to "Smith".

Title: Get User's Cognome
Preconditions: User already exists with a cognome.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing user object.
2. Call getCognome().
Expected Result: The user's cognome should be returned.

Title: Create a new Product
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Name: iPhone
- Luogo: USA
- Immagine: img1.jpg
- Prezzo: 999.99
- Proprietario: User with id 1
Test Steps:
1. Call new() method to create a product.
2. Set the product's name to "iPhone".
3. Set the product's location to "USA".
4. Set the product's image to "img1.jpg".
5. Set the product's price to 999.99.
6. Set the product's owner to the user with id 1.
Expected Result: A new product object with the provided data should be created.

Title: Update Product's Name
Preconditions: Product already exists with a name.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing product object.
2. Call setName("Samsung Galaxy").
Expected Result: The product's name should be updated to "Samsung Galaxy".

Title: Update Product's Location
Preconditions: Product already exists with a location.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing product object.
2. Call setLuogo("UK").
Expected Result: The product's location should be updated to "UK".

Title: Update Product's Image
Preconditions: Product already exists with an image.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing product object.
2. Call setImmagine("img2.jpg").
Expected Result: The product's image should be updated to "img2.jpg".

Title: Update Product's Price
Preconditions: Product already exists with a price.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing product object.
2. Call setPrezzo(899.99).
Expected Result: The product's price should be updated to 899.99.

Title: Update Product's Owner
Preconditions: Product already exists with an owner.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing product object.
2. Call setProprietario(User with id 2).
Expected Result: The product's owner should be updated to the user with id 2.

Title: Verify User Ownership of Product
Preconditions: User with id 1 owns a product.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the user with id 1.
2. Check if the user has any products associated with them.
Expected Result: The user with id 1 should have at least one product associated with them.

Title: Attempt to Set Invalid Email
Preconditions: User already exists with a valid email.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing user object.
2. Call setEmail("invalidemail").
Expected Result: An error should be thrown indicating that the email is invalid.

Title: Attempt to Set Invalid Price
Preconditions: Product already exists with a valid price.
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the existing product object.
2. Call setPrezzo(-100).
Expected Result: An error should be thrown indicating that the price is invalid.
